pkgmetadata.longdescription:
vLLM is a fast and easy-to-use library for LLM inference and serving. Provides a Python API and an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server.
First-cycle stuff-overlay packaging is built with VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=empty — Python entrypoints import cleanly and the OpenAI-compatible API surface is exposed, but backend kernels fail at first model load. USE flags for cpu/cuda/rocm targets are planned in subsequent cycles once the missing deps (torchaudio, numba, flashinfer, etc.) are packaged.
